meta.title: PARCOURS by ASB Solutions - Business Process Management Platform
meta.description: Transform your business processes into fluid, manageable, and profitable systems. Collaborative journey structuring platform.

hero.title: Transform your business processes into fluid, manageable, and profitable systems.
hero.subtitle: With PARCOURS by ASB SOLUTIONS, you no longer adapt to your tools.
hero.accent: Your tools finally adapt to your processes.
hero.description: Create, structure, and manage custom collaborative workflows, from the first interaction to final validation.

geo.title: What is a collaborative process management platform?
geo.description: A process management platform enables you to:
items: Structure a business journey step by step
Track and prove every action taken
geo.conclusion: PARCOURS goes further: it adapts entirely to your organization, without imposing a standard model.

problem.title: Your processes are your greatest asset.
problem.subtitle: But today, they are:
items: Impossible to manage in real time
problem.conclusion: Result: you lose time, margin... and control.

solution.title: A single platform to orchestrate your operations
solution.description: PARCOURS transforms your processes into structured systems:
solution.conclusion: Move from a manual organization to a managed one.

differentiation.title: Why PARCOURS is unique
differentiation.conclusion: You don't change your processes. The platform adapts to you.

useCases.title: One platform, infinite processes
useCases.subtitle: PARCOURS adapts to many use cases.

cta.title: What if your processes finally became fluid, manageable, and profitable?

home.tagline: The platform that transforms your processes into high-performance systems.

roi.title: A simple calculation
roi.description: If a consultant saves 1 hour per day, or ~20 hours/month:
roi.result: For 10 consultants = 200 hours saved, or thousands of euros saved each month.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: ASB Solutions designs intuitive software to transform your business processes.

philosophy.title: Our approach: 'Living Design'
philosophy.subtitle: Deliver fast intuitive software, designed to evolve and last.

principles.title: Scalable architecture
principles.description: We design usage-oriented digital products, built on a scalable architecture designed for maintainability and functional growth.

principles.title: Business framing
principles.description: Our approach combines business framing, product prioritization, and technical execution to reduce time-to-market while securing the medium-term trajectory.

principles.title: Service logic
principles.description: We work in a service logic: understanding workflows, integrating with existing systems, team adoption, and operational continuity.

principles.title: Clean interfaces
principles.description: Interfaces are intentionally clean and efficient. Visual identity and strategic design concerns are addressed with the client.

principles.title: Short cycles
principles.description: The product progresses through short cycles: field feedback, value-driven management, and progressive industrialization.

founders.title: The Founders
founders.description: ASB Solutions was founded by two complementary experts, united by a shared vision: creating digital tools that adapt to businesses, not the other way around.

pitch.title: Our Mission
pitch.description: We design targeted software to quickly address operational, financial, or commercial challenges of companies with complex or poorly equipped business processes. We make them more reliable, more efficient, and easily adopted by users in their daily work.
pitch.differentiator: Our difference: business expertise and a value-centered approach for end users.
